_comment: Spot Circle minimap mod - configuration. Place this file at one of: mods/configs/wot_spot_mod.json | res_mods/configs/wot_spot_mod.json | mods/wot_spot_mod.json (relative to game root). Press the reloadKey in-battle to hot-reload, or restart battle to apply changes.
_comment_view_mode: If true, use the player's own view range as the assumed enemy VR. If false, use enemyViewRangeFallback. VR above 445m is allowed and gives buffer against camo, even though physical spotting caps at 445m.
_comment_crew: Approximate crew Camouflage skill multiplicative bonus for the player's tank.
_comment_color: Circle colors as RGB int. 16737095=tomato (moving), 3329330=lime (still), 16753920=orange (afterShot), 2263842=forestGreen (camo net active).
_comment_perf: How often to recompute (s), and the speed (m/s) above which counts as moving.
_comment_fire: After firing, camo *= invisibilityFactorAtShot for fireRevealDuration seconds.
_comment_camo_net: Camo net activates after camoNetActivateSec of NOT MOVING and adds invisibilityBonus from descriptor.
_comment_picker_layout: Hotkeys are Keys.* names from scripts/client/Keys.py. Default layout uses the numpad: 8=prev enemy, 2=next enemy, 0=clear picker. Per-perk row: 1=rations, 3=vents, 4=BIA, 5=Recon, 6=SitAware, 7=stereoscope toggle. Overlay row: 9=toggle overlay text, NumpadEnter=print spot now, NumpadPeriod=reload config.
_comment_picker_bonuses: Per-perk multipliers, applied to the picked enemy's VR when toggle is on. Multiplied together when stacked. Conservative defaults; tune to match expected enemy loadouts. Rations 1.10 (combat rations/cola/coffee +10%), Vents 1.05 (improved ventilation +5%), BIA 1.05 (Brothers in Arms +5%), Recon 1.02 (commander Recon perk ~+2%), SitAware 1.03 (radio Sit. Awareness perk ~+3%).
_comment_overlay: Overlay posts a chat-line with the current spot distance to the in-battle message feed (above the minimap). overlayShowOnTickChange=true posts automatically when the radius changes by overlayMinRadiusDelta or the state changes. NumpadEnter prints the current value on demand. NumpadPeriod hot-reloads the config.
_comment_debug: Set true to log camo/radius/state each tick to python.log.
